overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay from Dishonored 2, showing a transition from a well-appointed traditional office interior with bookshelves and desks to the sunlit courtyard and ruined entrance of Aramis Stilton's Manor. The footage features smooth camera movement through detailed indoor environments before cutting to an outdoor scene with dilapidated historic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a marble entrance hallway with wooden double doors ahead. The camera moves forward and turns left through a glass partition into a side office, revealing a woman working at a desk surrounded by floor-to-ceiling bookshelves.

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the wood-paneled study, showing the desk and bookshelves, then exits back to the hallway and approaches the large wooden double doors. The doors open to reveal a spacious circular office beyond.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a grand circular office with a domed ceiling and tall windows. The room features a large curved desk with computer equipment, a projector screen displaying a map, and wooden bookshelves lining the walls. The camera circles around to examine a globe and investigation board.

events.description: entering side room with leather chaise lounge through wooden doorway

agents.ego_description: moving from the main office into a side sitting room to examine the furniture and windows

metal hookah with hoses on small wooden side table
tall windows with rolled-up blinds overlooking foggy exterior

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the main circular office through a wooden doorway into a smaller sitting room. The room contains a red leather chaise lounge, a hookah on a side table, and tall windows with blinds. The camera examines these details before turning back.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning to main office before scene transition

events.description: fade to black transitioning to outdoor courtyard scene

agents.ego_description: leaving the side room and moving back through the main office as the scene fades to black

entered.detail: wooden board with wanted poster and pinned photographs

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the main circular office, passing a wanted poster board on the wall. The view of the desk and domed ceiling returns before the screen fades to black, marking a transition to a new location.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit courtyard of dilapidated historic manor

entered.detail: ornate stone building facade with green patina, columns, and overgrown vines
wide stone staircase with balustrades leading to entrance
dry fountain basin with dead vegetation
dark interior hall with collapsed chandelier and rubble

segments.scene_description: The scene fades in to a sunlit courtyard of a dilapidated manor with stone pathways and a dry fountain. The camera ascends a grand staircase toward the ornate entrance of Aramis Stilton's Manor, passing dead vegetation and debris. Upon entering, the scene shifts to a dark, ruined interior with a collapsed chandelier and scattered rubble.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the refined, scholarly interiors of a private estate into the decaying ruins of a sunlit manor. It begins in a marble entrance hallway, gliding through a glass partition into a wood-paneled study filled with bookshelves before returning to the hall to pass through large double doors. The camera then enters a grand circular office with a domed ceiling and a map projector, briefly venturing into an adjacent sitting room with a red leather chaise lounge and a hookah before circling back to the main office. As the view fades and returns, the environment shifts abruptly to a bright, dilapidated courtyard with a dry fountain and dead vegetation. The movement finally ascends a grand staircase toward the ornate entrance of Aramis Stilton's Manor, transitioning from the blinding sunlight into a dark, ruined interior filled with rubble and a collapsed chandelier.
